stories.title: Initialize 50x50 grid
stories.description: Create init_grid(db) in engine/simulation.py that creates 2500 Tile rows with x=0..49, y=0..49, terrain='grass'. Must be idempotent -- calling twice should not duplicate rows. Uses the Tile model from engine/models.py.
stories.acceptance: Test creates a fresh DB, calls init_grid twice, asserts exactly 2500 Tile rows exist. Asserts tile at (0,0) and (49,49) both have terrain='grass'.

stories.title: Add Building model
stories.description: Add Building model to engine/models.py with fields: id (Integer PK), name (String), building_type (String), x (Integer), y (Integer), capacity (Integer default 10), created_at (DateTime). Add proper __tablename__ = 'buildings'.
stories.acceptance: Test imports Building from engine.models, creates one, asserts all fields exist and defaults work. capacity defaults to 10.

stories.title: Add NPC model
stories.description: Add NPC model to engine/models.py with fields: id (Integer PK), name (String), role (String), x (Integer), y (Integer), gold (Integer default 0), hunger (Integer default 0), energy (Integer default 100), home_building_id (Integer FK nullable), work_building_id (Integer FK nullable), target_x (Integer nullable), target_y (Integer nullable), created_at (DateTime).
stories.acceptance: Test imports NPC from engine.models, creates one, asserts all fields exist. gold defaults to 0, hunger to 0, energy to 100.

stories.title: Seed starter buildings
stories.description: Create seed_buildings(db) in engine/simulation.py that creates at least 3 buildings: Town Hall (building_type='civic', x=25, y=25), Farm (building_type='food', x=10, y=10), House (building_type='residential', x=30, y=30). Must be idempotent.
stories.acceptance: Test calls seed_buildings twice, asserts exactly 3 buildings exist. Asserts Town Hall is at (25,25) with type 'civic'.

stories.title: Seed starter NPCs
stories.description: Create seed_npcs(db) in engine/simulation.py that creates at least 5 NPCs with names and roles (farmer, baker, guard, merchant, priest) at valid grid positions (0-49). Must be idempotent.
stories.acceptance: Test calls seed_npcs twice, asserts exactly 5 NPCs exist. Asserts all NPCs have x,y in range 0-49 and non-empty names and roles.

stories.title: GET /api/world endpoint
stories.description: Create engine/routers/world.py with a GET /api/world endpoint. Returns JSON object with keys: tiles (list of all Tile rows), buildings (list of all Building rows), npcs (list of all NPC rows). Register router in engine/main.py.
stories.acceptance: Test GET /api/world returns 200 with JSON containing 'tiles', 'buildings', 'npcs' keys, each as lists.

stories.title: POST /api/tick endpoint
stories.description: Add POST /api/tick to engine/routers/world.py. Requires admin auth. Calls process_tick(db) from simulation.py. Returns {tick: N, status: 'ok'}. Create stub process_tick(db) in engine/simulation.py that increments WorldState.tick by 1.
stories.acceptance: Test POST /api/tick with admin credentials returns 200 with tick number. Test without admin returns 401/403.

stories.title: GET /api/buildings
stories.description: Create engine/routers/buildings.py with GET /api/buildings returning all buildings as a JSON list. Each building serialized with id, name, building_type, x, y, capacity, created_at. Register router in engine/main.py.
stories.acceptance: Test GET /api/buildings returns 200 with a JSON list. After seeding, list length >= 3.

stories.title: POST /api/buildings (admin)
stories.description: Add POST /api/buildings to engine/routers/buildings.py. Requires admin auth. Creates a building from JSON body {name, building_type, x, y}. Returns the created building as JSON with 201 status.
stories.acceptance: Test POST with admin creates building and returns it. Test POST without admin returns 401/403. Test missing fields returns 422.

stories.title: GET /api/npcs
stories.description: Create engine/routers/npcs.py with GET /api/npcs returning all NPCs as a JSON list. Each NPC serialized with all fields. Register router in engine/main.py.
stories.acceptance: Test GET /api/npcs returns 200 with a JSON list. After seeding, list length >= 5.

stories.title: POST /api/npcs (admin)
stories.description: Add POST /api/npcs to engine/routers/npcs.py. Requires admin auth. Creates NPC from JSON body {name, role, x, y}. Returns the created NPC as JSON with 201 status.
stories.acceptance: Test POST with admin creates NPC and returns it. Test POST without admin returns 401/403. Test missing fields returns 422.

stories.title: Add gold field to NPC
stories.description: Ensure NPC model in engine/models.py has gold Integer field with default 0. Verify the field is properly typed and accessible. Write a focused test for gold operations.
stories.acceptance: Test creates an NPC with gold=100, asserts npc.gold == 100. Test creates NPC with default, asserts gold == 0.

stories.title: Transfer gold function
stories.description: Create transfer_gold(db, sender_id, receiver_id, amount) in engine/simulation.py. Deducts amount from sender's gold, adds to receiver's gold. Returns True on success, False if sender has insufficient funds. Also creates a Transaction record.
stories.acceptance: Test transfer with sufficient funds succeeds and balances update. Test transfer with insufficient funds returns False and no changes. Test negative amount returns False.

stories.title: Transaction model and endpoint
stories.description: Add Transaction model to engine/models.py: id (PK), sender_id (FK to npcs), receiver_id (FK to npcs), amount (Integer), reason (String nullable), created_at (DateTime). Create engine/routers/transactions.py with GET /api/transactions returning transaction history.
stories.acceptance: Test creates a transaction, GET /api/transactions returns it. Test transaction has sender_id, receiver_id, amount fields.

stories.title: Add hunger field to NPC
stories.description: Ensure NPC model in engine/models.py has hunger Integer field with default 0, representing range 0-100. Higher values mean hungrier. Write focused test for hunger field.
stories.acceptance: Test creates NPC with default hunger=0. Test creates NPC with hunger=50 and asserts value. Test hunger field exists on model.

stories.title: Add energy field to NPC
stories.description: Ensure NPC model in engine/models.py has energy Integer field with default 100, representing range 0-100. Higher values mean more rested. Write focused test for energy field.
stories.acceptance: Test creates NPC with default energy=100. Test creates NPC with energy=30 and asserts value. Test energy field exists on model.

stories.title: Tick decay for hunger and energy
stories.description: In process_tick(db) in engine/simulation.py, increase all NPC hunger by 5 and decrease energy by 3 per tick. Clamp hunger to max 100 and energy to min 0. Apply to every NPC in the database.
stories.acceptance: Test runs process_tick once: NPC hunger goes from 0 to 5, energy from 100 to 97. Test clamping: NPC with hunger=98 becomes 100 (not 103). NPC with energy=1 becomes 0 (not -2).

stories.title: Assign homes to NPCs
stories.description: Create assign_homes(db) in engine/simulation.py. For each NPC without a home_building_id, find a residential building with capacity > current occupants and assign it. Skip NPCs that already have homes.
stories.acceptance: Test: create residential building with capacity=2, create 3 NPCs without homes. After assign_homes, 2 NPCs have home_building_id set, 1 does not.

stories.title: Assign work to NPCs
stories.description: Create assign_work(db) in engine/simulation.py. For each NPC without a work_building_id, find a non-residential building matching their role and assign it. Farmers go to food buildings, guards to guard buildings, etc.
stories.acceptance: Test: create Farm building, create NPC with role='farmer' and no work. After assign_work, NPC has work_building_id pointing to farm. NPC with unmatched role stays unassigned.

stories.title: Eating behavior
stories.description: Create eat(db, npc_id) in engine/simulation.py. Reduces the NPC's hunger by 30 (minimum 0). Costs 5 gold. If NPC has less than 5 gold, do nothing and return False. Returns True on success.
stories.acceptance: Test: NPC with hunger=50 and gold=10, after eat() hunger=20 and gold=5. Test: NPC with gold=3 cannot eat, returns False, hunger unchanged.

stories.title: Auto-eat in tick
stories.description: In process_tick(db) in engine/simulation.py, after hunger/energy decay, NPCs with hunger > 70 and gold >= 5 automatically call eat(). Process all qualifying NPCs.
stories.acceptance: Test: NPC starts with hunger=75, gold=10. After process_tick, hunger is reduced by 30 (after +5 decay, so 75+5-30=50). NPC with hunger=75, gold=2 does not eat.

stories.title: Sleeping behavior
stories.description: Create sleep_npc(db, npc_id) in engine/simulation.py. Restores the NPC's energy by 40, capped at 100. Always succeeds. Returns True.
stories.acceptance: Test: NPC with energy=30, after sleep_npc() energy=70. Test: NPC with energy=80, after sleep_npc() energy=100 (capped).

stories.title: Auto-sleep in tick
stories.description: In process_tick(db) in engine/simulation.py, NPCs with energy < 20 automatically call sleep_npc(). Process after hunger/energy decay and eating.
stories.acceptance: Test: NPC starts with energy=15. After process_tick (energy decreases by 3 to 12, then sleep restores +40 to 52). NPC with energy=50 does not sleep.

stories.title: WorldState model
stories.description: Add WorldState model to engine/models.py: id (PK), tick (Integer default 0), day (Integer default 1), time_of_day (String default 'morning'), weather (String nullable). Only one row should exist. Create init_world_state(db) in simulation.py that creates it idempotently.
stories.acceptance: Test: init_world_state creates exactly 1 WorldState row. Second call does not create another. tick defaults to 0, day to 1.

stories.title: NPC movement
stories.description: In process_tick(db) in engine/simulation.py, NPCs with target_x/target_y set move 1 step closer per tick. If x < target_x, x += 1. If x > target_x, x -= 1. Same for y. Clamp to 0-49. Clear target when reached.
stories.acceptance: Test: NPC at (5,5) with target (8,7), after 1 tick at (6,6). After 2 more ticks at (8,7) and target cleared. Test clamping at grid edges.

stories.title: Earn gold at work
stories.description: Create process_work(db) in engine/simulation.py. For each NPC that has a work_building_id and is at the same (x,y) as their work building, add 10 gold. Call this from process_tick.
stories.acceptance: Test: NPC at work building location earns 10 gold per tick. NPC not at work building earns nothing. NPC without work_building_id earns nothing.

stories.title: Resource model
stories.description: Add Resource model to engine/models.py: id (PK), name (String), quantity (Integer default 0), building_id (Integer FK to buildings), created_at (DateTime). __tablename__ = 'resources'.
stories.acceptance: Test imports Resource, creates one with name='Food', quantity=50, building_id set. Asserts all fields stored correctly.

stories.title: Food production
stories.description: Create produce_resources(db) in engine/simulation.py. For each building with building_type='food', find or create a Resource named 'Food' linked to that building and increase quantity by 10. Call from process_tick.
stories.acceptance: Test: Farm building exists. After produce_resources, Food resource linked to farm has quantity increased by 10. Two calls = +20.

stories.title: Buy food
stories.description: Create buy_food(db, npc_id) in engine/simulation.py. NPC spends 5 gold, hunger decreases by 30 (min 0). Requires a Food resource with quantity >= 1 at any building. Decrements food quantity by 1. Returns False if no food or insufficient gold.
stories.acceptance: Test: NPC with gold=10, hunger=50, food available. After buy_food: gold=5, hunger=20, food quantity decremented. Test with no food returns False.

stories.title: Treasury and taxes
stories.description: Create collect_taxes(db) in engine/simulation.py. Takes 10% (floor) of each NPC's gold and adds it to a Treasury building's gold_stored field. If no Treasury exists, create a Resource named 'Treasury' on Town Hall. Call from process_tick every 10 ticks.
stories.acceptance: Test: NPC with 100 gold, after collect_taxes has 90 gold. Treasury resource increased by 10. NPC with 5 gold loses 0 (floor of 0.5).

stories.title: Build building via simulation
stories.description: Create build_building(db, name, building_type, x, y) in engine/simulation.py. Validates x,y are in 0-49 range. Creates a Building row. Returns the new Building object. Raises ValueError if coordinates out of range or occupied.
stories.acceptance: Test: build_building creates building at valid coordinates. Test: out-of-range coordinates raise ValueError. Test: occupied tile raises ValueError.

stories.title: Population growth
stories.description: Create check_population_growth(db) in engine/simulation.py. If average NPC happiness > 60 and total NPC count < 100, spawn a new NPC with random name and role at a random valid position. Call from process_tick every 20 ticks.
stories.acceptance: Test: 5 NPCs all with happiness=80, population < 100. After check_population_growth, 6 NPCs exist. Test: happiness=40 does not spawn. Test: population=100 does not spawn.

stories.title: Event model
stories.description: Add Event model to engine/models.py: id (PK), event_type (String), description (String), tick (Integer), severity (String default 'info'), affected_npc_id (Integer FK nullable), affected_building_id (Integer FK nullable), created_at (DateTime).
stories.acceptance: Test imports Event, creates one with event_type='test', description='something happened', tick=1. Asserts severity defaults to 'info'.

stories.title: Auto-log events in tick
stories.description: In process_tick(db) in engine/simulation.py, log notable events as Event rows: NPC ate (event_type='npc_ate'), NPC slept (event_type='npc_slept'), gold transferred (event_type='gold_transfer'). Include NPC name in description.
stories.acceptance: Test: after process_tick where an NPC eats, an Event with event_type='npc_ate' exists. Test: after tick where NPC sleeps, event_type='npc_slept' exists.

stories.title: Weather system
stories.description: Create update_weather(db) in engine/simulation.py. Randomly sets WorldState.weather to one of: 'clear', 'rain', 'storm', 'snow', 'fog'. Weighted: clear 40%, rain 25%, storm 10%, snow 10%, fog 15%. Call from process_tick.
stories.acceptance: Test: after update_weather, WorldState.weather is one of the 5 valid values. Test: run 100 times, all values appear at least once.

stories.title: Weather effects
stories.description: Create apply_weather_effects(db) in engine/simulation.py. Rain: farms produce +20% (12 instead of 10). Storm: random building takes damage (create damage Event). Snow: NPC movement halved (move every other tick). Call from process_tick after weather update.
stories.acceptance: Test: weather='rain', farm produces 12 food instead of 10. Test: weather='storm', a damage Event is created. Test: weather='snow', NPC moves 0 steps on odd ticks.

stories.title: GET /api/events
stories.description: Create engine/routers/events.py with GET /api/events returning recent events as JSON list. Support ?limit=N query param (default 50). Order by created_at descending. Register in main.py.
stories.acceptance: Test: create 3 events, GET /api/events returns all 3. Test ?limit=1 returns only 1. Test events are ordered newest first.

stories.title: GET /api/stats
stories.description: Create engine/routers/stats.py with GET /api/stats returning JSON: {population, total_gold, avg_hunger, avg_energy, avg_happiness, total_buildings, current_tick, current_day}. All computed from DB. Register in main.py.
stories.acceptance: Test: seed data, GET /api/stats returns 200 with all 8 keys. population matches NPC count. total_gold matches sum of NPC gold.

stories.title: NPC happiness field
stories.description: Add happiness Integer field (default 50, range 0-100) to NPC model in engine/models.py. Create calculate_happiness(db, npc_id) in simulation.py: happiness = 100 - hunger + (energy/2) + min(gold, 50)/2, clamped 0-100. Call from process_tick.
stories.acceptance: Test: NPC with hunger=0, energy=100, gold=50 has happiness near 100. Test: NPC with hunger=100, energy=0, gold=0 has happiness=0. Test clamping.

stories.title: Personality traits
stories.description: Add personality String field to NPC model in engine/models.py (stores JSON string like '{"hardworking": true, "lazy": false}'). In seed_npcs, assign random personality traits from: hardworking, lazy, social, greedy, brave, cautious.
stories.acceptance: Test: seeded NPCs have non-empty personality field. Test: personality is valid JSON with at least one trait key.

stories.title: Utility-based decisions
stories.description: Create get_npc_decision(db, npc) in engine/simulation.py. Returns dict {action: 'eat'|'sleep'|'work'|'wander'} based on needs: hunger>70 -> eat, energy<20 -> sleep, has work -> work, else wander. Personality modifies thresholds (lazy NPCs sleep at energy<40).
stories.acceptance: Test: NPC with hunger=80 decides 'eat'. Test: NPC with energy=10 decides 'sleep'. Test: lazy NPC with energy=35 decides 'sleep'. Test: NPC with work building decides 'work'.

stories.title: Feature submit and list
stories.description: Create engine/routers/features.py with POST /api/features (body: {title, description}) creating a Feature row, and GET /api/features listing all features. Add Feature model to models.py: id, title, description, vote_count (default 0), status (default 'pending'), created_at. Register router.
stories.acceptance: Test: POST creates feature with title. GET returns list including it. Test: empty title returns 422. Test: vote_count defaults to 0.

stories.title: Voting with IP dedup
stories.description: Add POST /api/features/{id}/vote to features router. Records voter IP from request. Add Vote model: id, feature_id (FK), voter_ip (String), created_at. Unique constraint on (feature_id, voter_ip). Increments Feature.vote_count. Returns 409 on duplicate.
stories.acceptance: Test: first vote succeeds, vote_count=1. Second vote from same IP returns 409, vote_count still 1. Different IP succeeds, vote_count=2.

stories.title: Admin approval
stories.description: Add POST /api/features/{id}/approve to features router. Requires admin auth. Changes feature status from 'pending' to 'approved'. Returns updated feature. Non-admin gets 401/403.
stories.acceptance: Test: admin approves pending feature, status='approved'. Test: non-admin gets 401/403. Test: approving non-existent feature returns 404.

stories.title: PRD conversion
stories.description: Add POST /api/features/{id}/to-prd to the features router. Requires admin auth. Request body accepts: story_id (str), title (str), description (str), test_file (str). Maps these to Feature model fields: prd_story_id=story_id, prd_title=title, prd_description=description, prd_test_file=test_file. Changes feature status to 'published'. Only approved features can be converted (return 400 if not approved). Returns the full updated feature object including prd_story_id.
stories.acceptance: Test: admin converts approved feature to PRD, status='published', prd_title is set. Test: converting pending feature returns 400. Test: non-admin returns 401/403.

stories.title: Add bakery building type
stories.description: Add 'bakery' to BUILDING_TYPES list in engine/simulation.py. Create seed_bakery(db) that places one at appropriate coordinates. Add production/interaction rules in process_tick. Bakery converts wheat into bread. Produces 5 Bread per tick if Wheat resource available. Ralph will auto-generate an isometric sprite via ComfyUI after tests pass.
stories.acceptance: Test: 'bakery' is in BUILDING_TYPES. Test: seed_bakery creates exactly one bakery building. Test: production rules apply correctly in process_tick.

stories.title: Add drought event type
stories.description: Create trigger_drought(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. It must: (1) set WorldState.drought_active = 1 (add this Integer column, default=0, to the WorldState model if missing), (2) create an Event row with event_type="drought" and severity="high". Then UPDATE produce_resources in engine/simulation/production.py: at the top of the function, check db.query(WorldState).first().drought_active -- if truthy, halve base_production (set it to 5 instead of 10). Do NOT rewrite produce_resources from scratch -- only add the drought check at the top. Do NOT modify engine/simulation/__init__.py -- new functions in events.py are auto-exported.
stories.acceptance: Test: drought triggers under correct conditions. Test: effects apply correctly. Test: Event row created with type='drought'. Test: event ends after duration.

The test checks that at least one building has capacity < 10 after the flood. IMPORTANT: Do NOT filter buildings by position -- damage all of them.
stories.acceptance: Test: flood triggers under correct conditions. Test: effects apply correctly. Test: Event row created with type='flood'. Test: event ends after duration.

stories.title: Add NPC dialogue system
stories.description: Create generate_dialogue(db, speaker_id, listener_id) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Generate a dialogue string between two NPCs. Import Dialogue model from engine.models (already exists with fields: speaker_npc_id, listener_npc_id, message, tick). Return a non-empty string. Optionally save to Dialogue table.
stories.acceptance: Dialogue model exists. generate_dialogue returns a non-empty string. Dialogues reference current weather, NPC needs, and recent events. GET /api/dialogues returns dialogue history.

stories.title: Add NPC dialogue to tick processing
stories.description: In process_tick(db) in engine/simulation.py, after NPC movement, check for NPCs sharing the same tile. For each pair, call generate_dialogue(db, npc1.id, npc2.id) with 30% probability. Log the dialogue as an Event with event_type='dialogue'. Limit to max 5 dialogues per tick to avoid spam.
stories.acceptance: After running multiple ticks with NPCs on same tiles, Dialogue entries exist in DB. Events with type 'dialogue' are logged. No more than 5 dialogues per tick.

stories.title: Add dialogue feed to town view
stories.description: Create engine/routers/dialogues.py with GET /api/dialogues returning the 20 most recent dialogues with speaker name, listener name, message, and tick. Create engine/templates/partials/dialogue_feed.html showing dialogues as chat bubbles. Add an HTMX-powered dialogue feed panel to the index page that auto-updates every 3 seconds via hx-get='/partials/dialogue-feed'.
stories.acceptance: GET /api/dialogues returns JSON list. The dialogue feed partial renders chat-style bubbles with NPC names. Feed auto-updates via HTMX.

stories.title: Add building level and upgrade system
stories.description: Create upgrade_building(db, building_id) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Building model already has level field (default 1). The function increases level by 1. Also create POST /api/buildings/{building_id}/upgrade endpoint in engine/routers/buildings.py. Do NOT modify engine/models.py — the level field already exists.
stories.acceptance: Building.level field exists. upgrade_building increases level and deducts cost. Higher level buildings produce more. POST upgrade endpoint works with admin auth.

stories.title: Generate upgraded building sprites via ComfyUI
stories.description: Extend ralph/asset_gen.py with generate_upgraded_sprite(building_type, level) that generates a distinct sprite for each building level. Prompt pattern: 'zavy-ctsmtrc, isometric, cute isometric {building_type} building, level {level}, {'small and simple' if level==1 else 'large and ornate' if level>=4 else 'medium sized'}, white background, game asset'. Save to assets/buildings/{building_type}_lvl{level}.png. Update the PixiJS renderer to load level-specific sprites when available. Ralph will auto-generate an isometric sprite via ComfyUI after tests pass.
stories.acceptance: generate_upgraded_sprite creates level-variant sprites. PixiJS renderer checks for {type}_lvl{level}.png before falling back to {type}.png. At least level 1 and level 3 variants look visually different.

stories.title: Add real-time visitor counter with WebSocket
stories.description: Create engine/routers/ws.py with a WebSocket endpoint at /ws/visitors. Track connected clients in a global set. On connect, increment count and broadcast new count to all clients. On disconnect, decrement and broadcast. Create GET /api/visitors returning {count: N}. Add visitor count display to the HUD overlay in the PixiJS renderer.
stories.acceptance: WebSocket endpoint accepts connections. Visitor count increments on connect, decrements on disconnect. GET /api/visitors returns current count. Multiple simultaneous connections show correct count.

stories.title: Add visitor event triggers
stories.description: Create engine/routers/triggers.py with POST /api/trigger/{event_type} endpoint (public, rate-limited to 1 per IP per minute). Supported event types: thunderstorm, festival, gold_rush, baby_boom. Each trigger creates the corresponding Event and applies immediate effects via apply_triggered_event(db, event_type) in engine/simulation.py. Thunderstorm: set weather to storm for 5 ticks. Festival: boost all NPC happiness by 20. Gold rush: give all miners +50 gold. Baby boom: spawn 3 new NPCs.
stories.acceptance: POST /api/trigger/thunderstorm changes weather. POST /api/trigger/festival boosts happiness. Rate limited to 1/min per IP. Invalid event types return 404. Effects are visible in /api/world.

stories.title: Add event trigger buttons to town view
stories.description: Create engine/templates/partials/trigger_panel.html with styled buttons for each triggerable event (thunderstorm, festival, gold rush, baby boom). Each button uses hx-post='/api/trigger/{type}' with hx-swap='none'. Show a toast notification on success ('You triggered a thunderstorm!') and rate-limit feedback on 429 ('Wait a minute before triggering again'). Add the trigger panel to the index page as a floating panel in the bottom-right corner.
stories.acceptance: Trigger buttons appear on the town page. Clicking triggers the event via HTMX. Success shows a toast. Rate limit shows feedback. Events are visible in the simulation.

stories.title: Add NPC speech bubbles to PixiJS renderer
stories.description: Update engine/static/js/town.js to show speech bubbles above NPCs when they have recent dialogues. Poll GET /api/dialogues?limit=5&since_tick={current_tick-3} to get recent dialogues. Display the message text in a small white rounded rectangle above the speaking NPC sprite for 3 seconds, then fade out. Style: white background, dark text, small tail pointing down to the NPC.
stories.acceptance: When NPCs generate dialogue, speech bubbles appear above them on the isometric grid. Bubbles fade out after 3 seconds. Only recent dialogues (last 3 ticks) are shown. No more than 5 bubbles visible at once.

stories.title: Add day/night cycle to PixiJS renderer
stories.description: Update engine/static/js/town.js to render a day/night cycle based on WorldState.time_of_day from /api/world. Morning: warm golden tint overlay (alpha 0.1). Afternoon: no tint. Evening: orange-purple tint (alpha 0.15). Night: dark blue tint (alpha 0.4) with reduced brightness. Transition smoothly between states. Add small star particles during night. Add a sun/moon icon to the HUD showing current time.
stories.acceptance: The isometric grid changes color tint based on time of day. Night is visibly darker with star particles. Morning has a warm glow. HUD shows sun or moon icon. Transitions are smooth, not instant.

stories.title: Personality-driven NPC decisions
stories.description: Create personality_decision(db, npc_id) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Parse NPC.personality JSON. If 'greedy' is true, NPC saves 50% of gold (won't buy non-essentials if gold < 50). If 'social' is true, NPC moves toward nearest other NPC each tick. If 'lazy' is true, NPC skips work 25% of ticks. Return a string describing the decision made.

stories.title: Mood contagion between NPCs
stories.description: Create spread_mood(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each NPC with happiness > 70, boost nearby NPCs (within 3 tiles Euclidean) happiness by +2 (cap 100). For each NPC with happiness < 30, reduce nearby NPCs happiness by -1 (floor 0). Use math.sqrt for distance.

stories.title: NPC daily routines based on time of day
stories.description: Create apply_daily_routine(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Read WorldState.time_of_day. Morning: NPCs with work_building move toward it (set target_x/y). Afternoon: continue working. Evening: NPCs move toward tavern or home. Night: NPCs move toward home_building. Only set targets for NPCs that don't already have one.

stories.title: NPC gossip system
stories.description: Create spread_gossip(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Find pairs of living NPCs on the same tile (same x AND y). For each pair, merge their memory_events: each NPC learns up to 2 events from the other that they don't already have. Cap memory_events at 10. Parse/dump as JSON lists.

stories.title: NPC goal pursuit system
stories.description: Create pursue_goals(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Each NPC checks their experience JSON list for active goals. If no goals, assign one based on state: gold < 20 -> 'earn_gold', hunger > 60 -> 'find_food', happiness < 30 -> 'find_joy', skill < 3 -> 'learn'. Store goal as string in experience list. Return count of NPCs with active goals.

stories.title: NPC fear response to disasters
stories.description: Create flee_disaster(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Query recent Events with severity='high' or 'critical' from last 5 ticks. For each such event with affected_building_id, NPCs within 10 tiles of that building flee: set target_x/y to move away (add +15 to x and y, capped at 49). NPCs with 'brave' personality trait (parsed from JSON) do NOT flee.

stories.title: NPC aging effects on productivity
stories.description: Create apply_age_effects(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For living NPCs: age < 10 -> can't work (set work_building_id=None). Age 10-20 -> energy decays 50% slower (energy += 1 bonus). Age 60+ -> movement halved (only move every other tick, use WorldState.tick % 2). Age 70+ -> happiness -2 per tick from 'loneliness'. Return dict with counts per age bracket.

stories.title: Mentor-apprentice skill transfer
stories.description: Create mentor_apprentices(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Find NPCs with skill >= 5 (mentors). For each mentor, find NPCs on the same tile with skill < 3 (apprentices). Each apprentice gains +2 skill per call. Log 'mentored by {mentor.name}' to apprentice's memory_events. Return count of apprenticeships.

stories.title: NPC homesickness mechanic
stories.description: Create apply_homesickness(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with home_building_id set, calculate Euclidean distance from NPC (x,y) to home building (x,y). If distance > 10, reduce happiness by 1 per 5 tiles of distance (e.g., distance 15 = -1, distance 25 = -3). If distance <= 3, boost happiness by +2 (comfort bonus).

stories.title: NPC rivalry competition
stories.description: Create process_rivalries(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Query Relationships where relationship_type='rival'. For each rivalry pair, compare gold. If NPC has less gold than rival, NPC happiness -3 (jealousy). If NPC has more gold, NPC happiness +2 (satisfaction). If rivalry strength > 80, 10% chance rival commits theft Crime.

stories.title: Merchant caravan events
stories.description: Create trigger_merchant_caravan(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Create a temporary merchant NPC (role='caravan_merchant', gold=200) at a random edge tile (x=0 or x=49 or y=0 or y=49). Create an Event with event_type='merchant_caravan'. The merchant sells resources at 2x calculate_price and buys at 0.5x.

stories.title: Resource spoilage system
stories.description: Create apply_resource_spoilage(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each Resource where name is 'Food' or 'Fish' or 'Bread', reduce quantity by 10% (integer division). Resources in warehouse buildings (building.building_type == 'warehouse') are exempt. Create Event with event_type='spoilage' listing total spoiled.

stories.title: NPC economic class system
stories.description: Create classify_npcs(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each living NPC: gold < 20 = 'poor', 20-100 = 'middle', > 100 = 'rich'. Store class in NPC experience JSON as {'economic_class': 'poor'}. Return dict with counts per class. Rich NPCs get happiness +3, poor NPCs get happiness -3.

stories.title: Supply chain disruption detection
stories.description: Create detect_supply_disruptions(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Check production dependencies: bakery needs Wheat resource, blacksmith needs Ore. If required input resource quantity == 0, create Event with event_type='supply_disruption' and description naming the missing resource. Return list of disrupted building types.

stories.title: Progressive tax brackets
stories.description: Create collect_progressive_taxes(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Replace flat tax: NPC gold > 100 pays 15%, gold 20-100 pays 10%, gold < 20 pays 5%. Deduct tax from NPC gold, add to first Treasury. Create Transaction for each tax payment. Return total tax collected.

stories.title: Trade surplus auto-export
stories.description: Create process_exports(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each Resource with quantity > 200, export 50 units: reduce quantity by 50, add 50 gold to first Treasury. Create Event with event_type='export' describing the resource. Return list of exported resources.

stories.title: Skill-based wage multiplier
stories.description: Create calculate_skill_wage(db, npc_id) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Base wage from WorldState.base_wage. If NPC skill >= 5, wage *= 1.5. If skill >= 10, wage *= 2.0. If skill < 2, wage *= 0.75. Return integer wage amount.

stories.title: Bank interest for savers
stories.description: Create apply_bank_interest(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Requires at least one bank building to exist. For each living NPC with gold > 50, add 2% interest (gold * 0.02, rounded down, minimum 1). Create Transaction with reason='bank_interest'. Return total interest paid.

stories.title: Seasonal cycle system
stories.description: Create get_season(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Calculate from WorldState.day: day 1-25 = 'spring', 26-50 = 'summer', 51-75 = 'fall', 76-100 = 'winter', then cycle (day 101-125 = spring again). Use (day - 1) % 100. Return season string.

stories.title: Auto-trigger harvest festival in fall
stories.description: Create check_seasonal_events(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Import get_season. If season is 'fall' and WorldState.day % 25 == 1 (first day of fall), check if total Food resource quantity > 50. If yes, call trigger_harvest_festival(db). If season is 'winter' and day % 25 == 1, create 'winter_begins' Event.

stories.title: Winter hardship effects
stories.description: Create apply_winter_effects(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Import get_season. If season is 'winter': all NPC hunger increases by +3 extra per call (on top of normal decay). NPCs without home_building_id lose energy -5 extra. Create Event 'winter_hardship' if any NPC energy drops below 10.

stories.title: Epidemic contagion spread
stories.description: Create spread_epidemic(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. For each living NPC with illness_severity > 0, find other living NPCs on the same tile (same x,y). Each healthy neighbor has 30% chance (random.random() < 0.3) to get infected: set illness_severity = 10, illness = 10. Return count of new infections.

stories.title: Infrastructure collapse cascade
stories.description: Create check_infrastructure_collapse(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Count buildings with capacity < 5 vs total buildings. If damaged ratio > 0.5 (50%+), create Event event_type='infrastructure_collapse' with severity='critical'. Set WorldState.infrastructure_score to 0. Return True if collapsed, False otherwise.

stories.title: Annual town review report
stories.description: Create generate_town_review(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Calculate: population (living NPCs count), total_gold (sum of NPC gold), avg_happiness (mean of NPC happiness), building_count, crime_count (unresolved crimes). Create Newspaper with headline 'Annual Town Review' and body containing all stats. Return the stats dict.

stories.title: Random positive micro-events
stories.description: Create trigger_random_boon(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Roll random.random(). If < 0.01 (1% chance): pick one of 3 boons: (a) 'gold_vein' - add 100 gold to random NPC, (b) 'bumper_crop' - add 50 to first Food resource, (c) 'inspiration' - all NPCs +5 happiness. Create Event describing what happened. Return event_type or None.

stories.title: Refugee wave after disasters
stories.description: Create process_refugees(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Check if any Event with severity='critical' exists in last 10 ticks. If yes and not already processed (no 'refugee_wave' event in last 10 ticks), spawn 3 new NPCs with role='refugee', gold=0, hunger=70, happiness=20 at random positions. Create 'refugee_wave' Event. Return count spawned.

stories.title: Policy effect enforcement
stories.description: Create apply_policy_effects(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Query all Policy records with status='passed'. Parse each policy's effect JSON. Apply effects to WorldState: if 'tax_rate' key exists, set WorldState.tax_rate. If 'base_wage' key, set WorldState.base_wage. Mark applied policies as status='enacted'. Return count of policies applied.

stories.title: Mayor corruption system
stories.description: Create check_corruption(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Find NPC with role='mayor'. If mayor exists and has 'greedy' trait in personality JSON, mayor steals 10% of first Treasury's gold (move to mayor's personal gold). Create Crime with type='corruption' and criminal_npc_id=mayor.id. Return amount stolen or 0.

stories.title: Public approval rating
stories.description: Create calculate_approval(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Average happiness of all living NPCs = approval rating (0-100). If approval < 30, create Event event_type='unrest'. If approval > 70, create Event event_type='prosperity'. Return approval as integer.

stories.title: Emergency election on low approval
stories.description: Create check_emergency_election(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Count 'unrest' Events in last 50 ticks. If count >= 3, trigger hold_election(db) and create Event event_type='emergency_election'. Return True if election triggered, False otherwise.

stories.title: Town budget allocation
stories.description: Create allocate_budget(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Take first Treasury gold. Allocate: 40% to wages (increase WorldState.base_wage by allocated/100), 30% to infrastructure (repair buildings: +1 capacity to all buildings with capacity < 10), 20% to defense (create 'defense_budget' Event). Deduct total from treasury. Return allocation dict.

stories.title: Guard patrol movement
stories.description: Create patrol_guards(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Find all living NPCs with role='guard'. For each guard, if no target, set target to a random building position. If guard is at target, pick new random building. This makes guards patrol between buildings.

stories.title: Crime motivation from poverty
stories.description: Create check_crime_motivation(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC: if gold < 5 AND hunger > 70, there's a 20% chance (random.random() < 0.2) they commit theft. If personality has 'greedy'=true, chance doubles to 40%. Create Crime(criminal_npc_id=npc.id, type='theft', tick=current_tick). Steal 5 gold from random NPC. Return count of crimes.

stories.title: Prison sentence serving
stories.description: Create serve_sentences(db) in engine/simulation/effects.py. Find NPCs at prison buildings (work_building points to prison). For each, add 'imprisoned_tick' to memory_events if not present. Parse memory_events to count ticks imprisoned. After 50 ticks in prison, move NPC to a random non-prison building, clear prison assignment, set happiness -20. Return count released.

stories.title: Bounty board for unresolved crimes
stories.description: Create process_bounties(db) in engine/simulation/effects.py. Count unresolved Crimes. For each, if a guard NPC is within 5 tiles of the criminal NPC, resolve the crime and give guard +10 gold. Create Event event_type='bounty_collected'. Return count of bounties collected.

stories.title: Vigilante justice without guards
stories.description: Create vigilante_justice(db) in engine/simulation/effects.py. If no guard NPCs exist, check for unresolved Crimes. For each crime, find NPCs with 'brave'=true in personality JSON on same tile as criminal. 50% chance (random.random() < 0.5) they resolve the crime. If resolved, brave NPC gets happiness +5. Return count resolved.

stories.title: Skill specialization production bonus
stories.description: Create apply_skill_bonuses(db) in engine/simulation/production.py. For each Resource, find NPCs working at that resource's building. If worker skill >= 5, add 50% bonus to resource quantity. If skill >= 10, add 100% bonus instead. Return dict of {resource_name: bonus_applied}.

stories.title: Library research discoveries
stories.description: Create conduct_research(db) in engine/simulation/effects.py. If a library building exists, every call has 5% chance of a discovery. Discoveries: 'farming_technique' (add 10 to all Food resources), 'medical_breakthrough' (reduce all NPC illness_severity by 5), 'engineering' (all buildings +1 capacity). Create Event with event_type='research_discovery'. Return discovery name or None.

stories.title: Theater performance events
stories.description: Create hold_performance(db) in engine/simulation/effects.py. If theater building exists, create Event event_type='theater_performance'. All NPCs within radius 15 of theater get happiness +8. Create Dialogue from a random NPC at theater with message about the show. Return count of attendees boosted.

stories.title: Church ceremony happiness boost
stories.description: Create hold_ceremony(db) in engine/simulation/effects.py. If church building exists, find all NPCs within radius 10 of church. Each gets happiness +12 and all mutual Relationships between attendees strengthen by +3. Create Event event_type='church_ceremony'. Return count of attendees.

stories.title: Town hall grievance meetings
stories.description: Create hold_town_meeting(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Find the civic building (building_type='civic'). Find NPCs within 10 tiles. Identify most common complaint: lowest avg stat among hunger, energy, happiness, gold. Create Event event_type='town_meeting' with description naming the complaint. If hunger is worst, propose policy 'food_subsidy'. Return complaint string.

stories.title: Building auto-repair system
stories.description: Create repair_buildings(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. For each building with capacity < 10 (damaged), if at least one NPC with role in ('builder','blacksmith') has work_building_id pointing to it, increase capacity by +1 per call (cap at 10). Create Event event_type='building_repaired' for each repair. Return count of repairs.

stories.title: Building level production bonus
stories.description: Create get_level_multiplier(building_level) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Returns production multiplier: level 1 = 1.0, level 2 = 1.25, level 3 = 1.5, level 4 = 1.75, level 5 = 2.0. Simple formula: 1.0 + (level - 1) * 0.25. Return float.

stories.title: Housing crisis detection
stories.description: Create check_housing_crisis(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Count NPCs without home_building_id (homeless). Count total living NPCs. If homeless > 25% of population, create Event event_type='housing_crisis' with severity='high'. All homeless NPCs get happiness -5. Return homeless count.

stories.title: Market building enables trading
stories.description: Create check_market_exists(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Return True if any building with building_type='market' exists, False otherwise. This is a utility function used by trade functions to gate trading — no market means no NPC-to-NPC trade.

stories.title: Building capacity from worker count
stories.description: Create update_building_efficiency(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. For each building, count NPCs with work_building_id = building.id. If workers == 0, building produces nothing (store 'idle' in building name prefix if not already). If workers >= 3, building gets +2 effective capacity for production purposes. Return dict of {building_id: worker_count}.

stories.title: Town statistics API endpoint
stories.description: Create GET /api/stats/summary in engine/routers/stats.py. Return JSON with: population (living NPC count), total_gold (sum of NPC gold), avg_happiness (mean happiness), building_count, crime_rate (unresolved crimes / population), infrastructure_score from WorldState.

stories.title: NPC detail API endpoint
stories.description: Create GET /api/npcs/{npc_id} in engine/routers/npcs.py. Return full NPC data: all fields plus relationships (query Relationship table), home building name, work building name. Return 404 if NPC not found.

stories.title: Price history chart API
stories.description: Create GET /api/economy/price-history in engine/routers/economy.py. Accept optional query param resource_name. Return list of PriceHistory records (last 100 ticks) as JSON: [{resource_name, price, supply, demand, tick}]. If resource_name given, filter to that resource only.

stories.title: Event timeline API grouped by day
stories.description: Create GET /api/events/timeline in engine/routers/events.py. Group events by day (tick // 4 = day). Return JSON: [{day: N, events: [{event_type, description, severity, tick}]}]. Limit to last 10 days. Sort by day descending.

stories.title: NPC dream system
stories.description: Create process_dreams(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC where WorldState.time_of_day == 'night', pick a random dream from ['found_treasure', 'nightmare', 'peaceful', 'adventure']. Append dream to NPC memory_events JSON list (cap at 10). 'found_treasure' gives happiness +3, 'nightmare' gives happiness -2. Return count of dreamers.

stories.title: Career progression
stories.description: Create check_career_progression(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with skill >= 8, promote: if role is 'farmer' promote to 'master_farmer', 'guard' to 'captain', 'merchant' to 'guild_master'. Append 'promoted to {new_role}' to memory_events. Give promoted NPC happiness +10. Return count of promotions.

stories.title: NPC retirement
stories.description: Create process_retirement(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with age > 70: set energy gain to half (energy += 1 instead of normal). If NPC has work_building_id, 50% chance each call to retire (set work_building_id=None, append 'retired' to memory_events). Retired NPCs get happiness +5 (relief). Return count of retirements.

stories.title: Family inheritance
stories.description: Create process_inheritance(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each NPC where is_dead == 1, check if any Relationship with relationship_type='family' exists. If so, distribute dead NPC's gold equally among living family members. Set dead NPC gold to 0. Create Transaction for each transfer with reason='inheritance'. Return total gold distributed.

stories.title: Child NPC growth
stories.description: Create process_child_growth(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with age < 18: set work_building_id=None (can't work). Increase skill by +1 per call (learning fast). If age >= 18 and no work_building_id, assign to a random building with capacity > 0. Return count of children.

stories.title: NPC persuasion
stories.description: Create attempt_persuasion(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Find pairs of NPCs on the same tile. If NPC A has skill > NPC B skill, A can persuade B: 30% chance B adopts A's current goal (from experience JSON). Append 'persuaded by {A.name}' to B's memory_events. Return count of successful persuasions.

stories.title: Crowd behavior
stories.description: Create process_crowd_behavior(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Find tiles with 3+ living NPCs. For each crowd tile: all NPCs on that tile get happiness +2 (socializing). If any Event exists at a building on that tile, NPCs move away (set target_x/y to random nearby tile within 5). Return count of crowd tiles.

stories.title: Emotion memory tracking
stories.description: Create track_emotions(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC, parse their memory_events JSON. Append current happiness to a 'mood_history' list stored in experience JSON. Keep only last 5 entries. Calculate mood_trend: if last value > first value, trend='improving'; if less, trend='declining'; else 'stable'. Return dict of {npc_id: trend}.

stories.title: NPC migration out
stories.description: Create process_emigration(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with happiness < 15 for 3+ consecutive mood_history entries (from experience JSON), NPC leaves: set is_dead=1, append 'emigrated' to memory_events. Create Event event_type='npc_emigrated'. Return count of emigrants.

stories.title: NPC arrival by prosperity
stories.description: Create check_immigration(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Calculate avg happiness of all living NPCs. If avg > 65 and living NPC count < 20, spawn 1 new NPC with role='newcomer', gold=30, random position. Create Event event_type='npc_arrived'. Return True if spawned, False otherwise.

stories.title: Friendship decay
stories.description: Create decay_friendships(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each Relationship with relationship_type='friend', reduce strength by 1 per call (floor at 0). If strength reaches 0, change relationship_type to 'acquaintance'. Return count of decayed friendships.

stories.title: NPC specialization bonus
stories.description: Create apply_specialization_bonus(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC, check experience JSON for 'ticks_in_role' counter. Increment by 1 each call. If ticks_in_role > 50, NPC gets +1 skill (cap 15). Store updated counter back in experience. Return count of specialists.

stories.title: NPC fatigue system
stories.description: Create apply_fatigue(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with energy < 20: reduce skill effectiveness by setting a 'fatigued' flag in experience JSON. Fatigued NPCs produce 50% less (halve any production bonus). If energy < 5, NPC collapses: move to home building, set energy=0. Return count of fatigued NPCs.

stories.title: NPC celebration
stories.description: Create check_celebrations(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with happiness > 90, trigger celebration: all NPCs within 5 tiles get happiness +3. Create Event event_type='celebration' with description '{npc.name} is celebrating!'. Max 1 celebration per call. Return celebrating NPC name or None.

stories.title: NPC mourning
stories.description: Create process_mourning(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each dead NPC (is_dead==1), find living NPCs with Relationship to them (any type). Each mourner gets happiness -5 and 'mourning {dead.name}' appended to memory_events. Only mourn once per dead NPC (check memory_events for existing mourning entry). Return count of mourners.

stories.title: Trade guild formation
stories.description: Create check_guild_formation(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Count living NPCs with role='merchant'. If count >= 3 and no Event event_type='guild_formed' exists, create guild: create Event event_type='guild_formed'. All merchants get +10 gold bonus and happiness +5. Return True if guild formed, False otherwise.

stories.title: Monopoly detection
stories.description: Create detect_monopoly(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each Resource, find which NPC's work_building produces it. If one NPC controls 80%+ of total production buildings for that resource, create Event event_type='monopoly_detected' with description naming the NPC and resource. Return list of monopolist NPC names.

stories.title: Price ceiling during disasters
stories.description: Create enforce_price_ceiling(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Check if any Event with severity='critical' exists in last 10 ticks. If so, for each Resource, cap price at 2x the base price (base_price = 10). If current price > ceiling, set to ceiling. Return count of prices capped.

stories.title: Commodity futures
stories.description: Create create_futures_contract(db, npc_id, resource_name, quantity, price) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Store contract in NPC experience JSON under 'futures' list: {resource, quantity, price, tick}. When resource price drops below contract price, NPC profits (add difference * quantity to gold). Return contract dict.

stories.title: Debt forgiveness
stories.description: Create process_debt_forgiveness(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each NPC with is_bankrupt==1, check WorldState.tick minus the tick they went bankrupt (store in experience JSON as 'bankrupt_tick'). If 100+ ticks have passed, set is_bankrupt=0, give NPC 20 gold, happiness +10. Create Event event_type='debt_forgiven'. Return count forgiven.

stories.title: Economic boom detection
stories.description: Create detect_economic_boom(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Sum all living NPC gold. Compare to previous sum stored in an Event event_type='gold_snapshot' description (create one each call with current total). If current > previous * 1.1 (10% growth), create Event event_type='economic_boom'. All NPCs get happiness +3. Return True if boom, False otherwise.

stories.title: Recession detection
stories.description: Create detect_recession(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Track total NPC gold over last 3 calls using Event records event_type='gold_snapshot' (query last 3 by tick descending). If gold decreased for 3 consecutive checks, create Event event_type='recession'. All NPCs happiness -3. Return True if recession, False otherwise.

stories.title: Wage negotiation
stories.description: Create process_wage_negotiations(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each living NPC with skill >= 5 and work_building_id set: 30% chance to negotiate raise. If successful, NPC gets +2 gold per future pay cycle (store 'wage_bonus' in experience JSON, default 0). Cap wage_bonus at 10. Return count of successful negotiations.

stories.title: Tip system
stories.description: Create process_tips(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each Transaction where receiver NPC happiness > 70, there's a 25% chance of a tip: create additional Transaction with amount = original * 0.1 (min 1), reason='tip'. Add tip gold to receiver. Return total tips given.

stories.title: Resource quality tiers
stories.description: Create assign_resource_quality(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each Resource, assign quality based on producing NPC skill: skill < 3 = 'basic', 3-7 = 'fine', >= 8 = 'masterwork'. Store quality string in Resource name suffix (e.g., 'Food (fine)'). 'masterwork' items sell for 2x price. Return dict of {resource_name: quality}.

stories.title: Import/export balance tracking
stories.description: Create calculate_trade_balance(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Count Events with event_type='export' (exports) and event_type='import' or 'merchant_caravan' (imports) in last 100 ticks. Calculate balance = export_count - import_count. Create Event event_type='trade_report' with balance in description. Return balance integer.

stories.title: Inflation adjustment
stories.description: Create adjust_for_inflation(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Check WorldState.inflation_rate (default 0). If inflation_rate > 0.2, increase WorldState.base_wage by 1 (cap at 20). If inflation_rate < -0.1 (deflation), decrease base_wage by 1 (floor at 1). Return new base_wage value.

stories.title: Gold sink events
stories.description: Create run_gold_sink(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. If first Treasury gold > 200, spend 50 gold on a festival: create Event event_type='festival', deduct 50 from Treasury. All living NPCs get happiness +8. If Treasury < 50, skip. Return gold spent or 0.

stories.title: Economic report generation
stories.description: Create generate_economic_report(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Calculate: total_gold (sum NPC gold), treasury_gold, avg_gold (mean NPC gold), richest NPC name, poorest NPC name, total_resources (sum all Resource quantities). Create Newspaper with headline='Economic Report' and body with all stats. Return the stats dict.

stories.title: Wealth inequality index
stories.description: Create calculate_gini(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Calculate Gini coefficient from living NPC gold values. Formula: sum of |xi - xj| for all pairs / (2 * n * mean). Return float 0.0 (perfect equality) to 1.0 (max inequality). If only 1 NPC, return 0.0. Create Event event_type='gini_report' with value in description.

stories.title: Multi-day event chains
stories.description: Create process_event_chains(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. For each Event with severity='high' created in last 3 ticks that has no follow-up, create a follow-up Event: same event_type with '_aftermath' suffix, severity one level lower. E.g., 'fire' -> 'fire_aftermath' with severity='medium'. Return count of follow-ups created.

stories.title: Event severity escalation
stories.description: Create escalate_events(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. For each active Event (created in last 5 ticks) with severity='medium', if no guard NPC exists within 10 tiles of affected_building, escalate to severity='high'. If already 'high' and still unresolved after 10 ticks, escalate to 'critical'. Return count of escalations.

stories.title: Event recovery bonus
stories.description: Create apply_recovery_bonus(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Check if any Event with severity='critical' was created 20-30 ticks ago. If so and no current critical events exist, all living NPCs get happiness +10 (relief). Create Event event_type='recovery'. Only trigger once per recovery. Return True if bonus applied.

stories.title: Anniversary events
stories.description: Create check_anniversaries(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. If WorldState.day is a multiple of 100 (anniversary of town founding), create Event event_type='anniversary' with description 'Town celebrates day {day}!'. All NPCs get happiness +15. Create Newspaper with celebration headline. Return True if anniversary, False otherwise.

stories.title: Visitor trader events
stories.description: Create spawn_visitor_trader(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. 5% chance per call to spawn a visitor. Create NPC with role='visitor_trader', gold=150, random edge position (x or y = 0 or 49). Create Event event_type='visitor_trader'. Visitor sells rare resources at 3x price. Return visitor NPC or None.

stories.title: Festival voting
stories.description: Create hold_festival_vote(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Each living NPC 'votes' based on their lowest stat: hunger -> 'food_festival', happiness -> 'music_festival', energy -> 'rest_day'. Tally votes, pick winner. Create Event event_type=winner. Return winning festival type.

stories.title: Weather prediction
stories.description: Create predict_weather(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Based on current WorldState.weather, predict next: 'sunny' -> 70% sunny, 20% cloudy, 10% rain. 'cloudy' -> 30% sunny, 40% cloudy, 30% rain. 'rain' -> 10% sunny, 40% cloudy, 40% rain, 10% storm. Store prediction in WorldState or return it. Return predicted weather string.

stories.title: Crop yield calculation
stories.description: Create calculate_crop_yield(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Import get_season. Base yield = 10. Multiply by season: spring=1.2, summer=1.5, fall=1.0, winter=0.3. Multiply by weather: sunny=1.2, cloudy=1.0, rain=0.8, storm=0.2. Add worker skill bonus (highest farmer skill * 0.1). Return integer yield.

stories.title: Famine relief distribution
stories.description: Create distribute_famine_relief(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. If any Food Resource quantity < 10 and living NPC count > 3, trigger famine relief: take 30 gold from first Treasury, add 20 to first Food resource quantity. Create Event event_type='famine_relief'. Each NPC hunger reduced by 10 (floor 0). Return True if relief distributed.

stories.title: Building damage from events
stories.description: Create apply_event_damage(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. For each Event with severity='critical' in last 5 ticks that has affected_building_id, reduce that building's capacity by 3 (floor at 1). If building capacity drops to 1, create follow-up Event event_type='building_destroyed'. Return count of buildings damaged.

stories.title: Event newspaper coverage
stories.description: Create generate_event_news(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. For each Event created in the current tick (WorldState.tick), create a Newspaper with headline based on event_type and body based on description. Priority events: severity='critical' get 'BREAKING: ' prefix. Return count of articles created.

stories.title: Memorial creation
stories.description: Create create_memorial(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. After a critical event that affected a building, create a new Building with building_type='memorial', name='Memorial for {event_type}', at a position near the affected building (x+1, y+1, capped at 49). Return memorial building or None if no qualifying event.

stories.title: Event prevention by guards
stories.description: Create calculate_prevention_chance(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Count guard NPCs. Each guard adds 5% prevention chance (cap at 50%). When a new 'bandit' or 'theft' event would trigger, roll random.random(). If < prevention_chance, prevent it: create Event event_type='event_prevented' instead. Return prevention_chance float.

stories.title: Seasonal migration
stories.description: Create process_seasonal_visitors(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Import get_season. In 'summer', 10% chance to spawn a visitor NPC (role='tourist', gold=50). In 'winter', any existing tourist NPCs leave (set is_dead=1). Create Event for arrivals/departures. Return count of visitors spawned or removed.

stories.title: Legendary event
stories.description: Create check_legendary_event(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. If WorldState.tick > 1000 and no Event event_type='legendary' exists ever, 1% chance to trigger. Legendary event: 'dragon_sighting' — all NPCs flee (set target to random edge), all buildings lose 1 capacity, but 500 gold added to Treasury. Create Event and Newspaper. Return True if triggered.

stories.title: Political faction system
stories.description: Create assign_factions(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. For each living NPC without a faction (no 'faction' in experience JSON), assign based on priorities: gold > 50 -> 'merchants_guild', skill > 5 -> 'artisans_guild', happiness < 40 -> 'reform_party', else -> 'independents'. Store in experience JSON. Return dict of faction counts.

stories.title: Policy proposal queue
stories.description: Create manage_proposal_queue(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Count Policy records with status='proposed'. If count > 3, reject the oldest (set status='expired'). Return count of active proposals. This ensures only 3 proposals are active at once.

stories.title: Term limits for mayor
stories.description: Create check_term_limits(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Find NPC with role='mayor'. Check their experience JSON for 'mayor_since_tick'. If WorldState.tick - mayor_since_tick > 240, trigger new election: call hold_election(db). Create Event event_type='term_limit_reached'. Return True if term ended.

stories.title: Impeachment mechanic
stories.description: Create check_impeachment(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Find NPC with role='mayor'. Calculate avg happiness of all living NPCs. If avg < 25, trigger impeachment vote: 60% chance of removal (random.random() < 0.6). If removed, set mayor role to 'citizen', trigger hold_election(db). Create Event event_type='impeachment'. Return True if removed.

stories.title: Tax revolt
stories.description: Create check_tax_revolt(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. If WorldState.tax_rate > 0.2 and avg NPC happiness < 30, trigger revolt: all NPCs refuse to pay tax for 10 ticks (store 'revolt_until_tick' in WorldState or events). Create Event event_type='tax_revolt' with severity='high'. Return True if revolt triggered.

stories.title: Public works projects
stories.description: Create launch_public_works(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. If first Treasury gold > 100, spend 50 gold: pick building with lowest capacity, increase capacity by 3. Create Event event_type='public_works' with building name. Deduct from Treasury. Return upgraded building name or None.

stories.title: Diplomatic missions
stories.description: Create send_diplomat(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Pick NPC with highest skill and role!='mayor'. Set their target_x/y to edge of map (x=49). Create Event event_type='diplomatic_mission'. After 20 ticks (check experience JSON 'mission_start_tick'), diplomat returns with 30 gold. Return diplomat NPC name or None.

stories.title: Census system
stories.description: Create run_census(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Count: living NPCs, dead NPCs, total buildings, total gold, avg happiness, avg age. Store snapshot as Event event_type='census' with all stats in description JSON. Only run if no census in last 50 ticks. Return stats dict.

stories.title: Town charter
stories.description: Create generate_charter(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Compile all Policy records with status='enacted' into a charter document. Create Newspaper with headline='Town Charter Updated' and body listing all enacted policies. Return list of policy names.

stories.title: Emergency powers
stories.description: Create grant_emergency_powers(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. If any Event with severity='critical' exists in last 5 ticks, find mayor NPC. Mayor gets 'emergency_powers' flag in experience JSON. With emergency powers, mayor can: set tax_rate directly, repair any building +2 capacity. Powers expire after 20 ticks. Return True if granted.

stories.title: Building adjacency bonuses
stories.description: Create calculate_adjacency_bonuses(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. For each building, check buildings within 3 tiles (Euclidean). Specific bonuses: farm near well = +2 capacity, blacksmith near mine = +2 capacity, tavern near residential = +1 capacity. Return dict of {building_id: bonus}.

stories.title: Road network speed bonus
stories.description: Create calculate_road_bonus(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Count buildings with building_type='road' (or 'gate'). Each road adds 1% movement speed bonus to all NPCs (cap at 20%). Store road_bonus percentage in WorldState or return it. Return integer percentage bonus.

stories.title: Building specialization
stories.description: Create set_building_focus(db, building_id, focus) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Valid focuses: 'production', 'training', 'storage'. Production focus: +50% output. Training: workers gain +1 skill per cycle. Storage: +5 effective capacity. Store focus as building name suffix. Return updated building.

stories.title: Ruin decay system
stories.description: Create process_building_decay(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. For each building with no workers (no NPC has work_building_id pointing to it), reduce capacity by 1 per call (floor at 1). If capacity reaches 1, rename to 'Ruins of {original_name}' if not already. Create Event event_type='building_decayed'. Return count of decayed buildings.

stories.title: Construction queue
stories.description: Create process_construction(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Check for NPC with role='builder'. If builder exists, check experience JSON for 'construction_project'. If no project, assign: create building stub with capacity=0 at random empty tile. Each call, builder increases capacity by 1. When capacity reaches 5, building is complete. Return project status string.

stories.title: Building insurance
stories.description: Create process_insurance(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. For each building, check if 'insured' flag exists (store in building name or via a tag). Insured buildings: if damaged by event (capacity reduced), auto-repair +2 capacity. Insurance costs 5 gold from first Treasury per insured building per call. Return count of insured buildings.

stories.title: Landmark buildings
stories.description: Create check_landmarks(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Buildings with level >= 4 become landmarks. Landmarks give town-wide happiness +1 per landmark (cap +5 total). Create Event event_type='landmark_status' listing landmark names. Return count of landmarks.

stories.title: Building inspection
stories.description: Create inspect_buildings(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. For each building: check capacity vs original (10). If capacity < 5, status='damaged'. If capacity < 3, status='critical'. If no workers, status='abandoned'. Else status='operational'. Return list of dicts [{building_id, name, status, capacity}].

stories.title: Resource storage limits
stories.description: Create enforce_storage_limits(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Count warehouse buildings. Each warehouse adds 100 to storage cap (base 200). For each Resource, if quantity > storage_cap, set quantity to storage_cap (excess lost). Create Event event_type='storage_overflow' if any capped. Return storage_cap value.

stories.title: Building rename system
stories.description: Create rename_building(db, building_id, new_name) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Validate new_name is 1-50 chars and alphanumeric+spaces. Update building.name. Create Event event_type='building_renamed' with old and new name. Return updated building name or None if invalid.

stories.title: NPC biography API
stories.description: Create GET /api/npcs/{npc_id}/biography in engine/routers/npcs.py. Return NPC life history: name, role, age, gold, relationships list, memory_events (parsed from JSON), work building name, home building name. Return 404 if not found.

stories.title: Building history API
stories.description: Create GET /api/buildings/{building_id}/history in engine/routers/buildings.py. Return building details plus: current workers (NPC names), events affecting this building (query Event where affected_building_id matches), current capacity and level. Return 404 if not found.

stories.title: Economic chart data API
stories.description: Create GET /api/economy/chart-data in engine/routers/economy.py. Accept query param 'days' (default 10). Return JSON with: gold_over_time (list of {tick, total_gold} from Transactions), price_over_time (from PriceHistory). Aggregate by day (tick // 24).

stories.title: Relationship graph API
stories.description: Create GET /api/relationships/graph in engine/routers/npcs.py. Return JSON with nodes (NPC id, name, role) and edges (Relationship npc_id, target_npc_id, type, strength). Format suitable for graph visualization libraries.

stories.title: Town achievement progress API
stories.description: Create GET /api/achievements in engine/routers/stats.py. Check milestones: population >= 10, total_gold >= 500, buildings >= 30, stories_done >= 100. Return list of {name, description, achieved: bool}.

stories.title: Event calendar API
stories.description: Create GET /api/events/calendar in engine/routers/events.py. Accept query params 'from_day' and 'to_day'. Return events grouped by day: [{day, events: [{event_type, description, severity}]}]. Default: last 7 days.

stories.title: Resource flow API
stories.description: Create GET /api/economy/resource-flow in engine/routers/economy.py. For each Resource, calculate production rate (quantity change per day from recent data) and consumption estimate (transactions involving that resource). Return [{resource_name, quantity, production_rate, consumption_rate}].

stories.title: Leaderboard API
stories.description: Create GET /api/leaderboards in engine/routers/stats.py. Return top 5 NPCs in each category: richest (by gold), most skilled (by skill), happiest (by happiness), oldest (by age). Each entry has npc_id, name, value.

stories.title: Town history summary API
stories.description: Create GET /api/town/history in engine/routers/stats.py. Return chronological list of key Events: elections, disasters, achievements, milestones. Limit to 50 most recent. Each entry has tick, day, event_type, description.

stories.title: Simulation config API
stories.description: Create GET /api/config in engine/routers/stats.py. Return current simulation settings from WorldState: tick, day, time_of_day, weather, tax_rate, base_wage, inflation_rate, infrastructure_score. Read-only endpoint.

stories.title: NPC name generator
stories.description: Create generate_npc_name(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Define FIRST_NAMES list of 20 names and LAST_NAMES list of 20 names. Pick random first + last. Ensure no duplicate full names among living NPCs. Return the generated name string.

stories.title: Building description generator
stories.description: Create generate_building_description(db, building_id) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Based on building_type and level, generate a description string. E.g., level 1 farm = 'A modest farm with basic tools', level 3 = 'A prosperous farm with irrigation'. Use a dict mapping (type, level) to descriptions. Return description string.

stories.title: Daily digest
stories.description: Create generate_daily_digest(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Summarize last 24 ticks: count events by type, NPC births/deaths, gold change, weather changes. Create Newspaper with headline='Daily Digest Day {day}'. Return summary dict.

stories.title: Prosperity score
stories.description: Create calculate_prosperity(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Composite score 0-100: avg_happiness * 0.3 + (avg_gold/10 capped at 30) * 0.3 + (building_count/30 capped at 1.0) * 0.2 + (1.0 - crime_rate) * 0.2. Store in WorldState. Return integer prosperity score.

stories.title: Danger score per tile
stories.description: Create calculate_danger_scores(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. For each tile, count crimes and disaster events within 5 tiles (from Crime and Event tables). Score = crime_count * 2 + disaster_count * 3. Return dict of {(x,y): danger_score} for tiles with score > 0.

stories.title: NPC compatibility score
stories.description: Create calculate_compatibility(db, npc_id_a, npc_id_b) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Compare two NPCs: same role = +20, age difference < 10 = +15, both happiness > 50 = +10, existing relationship = +25. Score 0-100. Return integer compatibility score.

stories.title: Auto-assign homeless NPCs
stories.description: Create assign_homeless(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Find living NPCs without home_building_id. Find residential buildings with available capacity (count current residents < building capacity). Assign NPCs to buildings with space. Return count of NPCs assigned.

stories.title: Auto-assign unemployed NPCs
stories.description: Create assign_unemployed(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Find living NPCs without work_building_id and age >= 18. Find buildings with available worker slots (count current workers < building capacity). Assign NPCs to buildings with openings, preferring buildings matching NPC role. Return count assigned.

stories.title: Town population cap
stories.description: Create get_population_cap(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Count residential building total capacity. Cap = sum of all residential building capacities. If living NPC count >= cap, no new NPCs can spawn (return False). If under cap, return True. Also return the cap value. Return tuple (can_spawn: bool, cap: int).

stories.title: End-of-day report
stories.description: Create generate_end_of_day_report(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. If WorldState.tick % 24 == 0, compile: population, total_gold, avg_happiness, events_today (last 24 ticks), weather. Create Event event_type='end_of_day_report' with all stats in description JSON. Return stats dict or None if not end of day.

stories.title: NPC stress system
stories.description: Create calculate_npc_stress(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC (is_dead==0): stress_level = 0. If hunger > 70, stress_level += 2. If energy < 30, stress_level += 2. If gold < 5, stress_level += 2. If stress_level >= 4, reduce happiness by stress_level (min 0). Return count of stressed NPCs (stress_level >= 4).

stories.title: NPC hobby selection
stories.description: Create assign_npc_hobbies(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC (is_dead==0) with energy > 50 and no work_building_id (idle): pick a random building that is not their home. Store building.id in NPC.favorite_buildings JSON field (as list, append if exists, max 3 entries). Return count of NPCs who got a hobby assigned.

stories.title: NPC gossip propagation
stories.description: Create propagate_gossip(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with memory_events (JSON list, not empty): find other living NPCs within distance 5 (abs(x-x2)+abs(y-y2) <= 5). Copy the last memory_event entry to nearby NPC memory_events (append, max 10 entries). Return count of gossip transfers.

stories.title: NPC trust system
stories.description: Create update_trust_scores(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each Relationship: if relationship_type=='friend' and strength > 50, that is high trust. If relationship_type=='rival' or strength < 20, that is low trust. Create trust metric: high_trust_count - low_trust_count per NPC. NPCs with trust < 0 get happiness -1. Return dict of {npc_id: trust_score}.

stories.title: NPC gift giving
stories.description: Create process_gift_giving(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with happiness > 70 and gold > 100: find friends (Relationship with relationship_type=='friend'). Give 10 gold to friend with lowest gold. Create Transaction record. Return count of gifts given.

stories.title: NPC grudge system
stories.description: Create process_grudges(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Query all Crime records. For each crime, find affected NPC via Event with affected_npc_id. Create or update Relationship between victim and criminal: relationship_type='rival', strength += 10 (max 100). Return count of grudges created or updated.

stories.title: NPC mentorship
stories.description: Create process_mentorship(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with skill > 80 (mentor): find nearby living NPCs (distance <= 3) with skill < 40 (student). Increase student skill by +3. Create Relationship(relationship_type='mentor', strength=60) if not exists. Return count of mentorships processed.

stories.title: NPC homesickness
stories.description: Create check_homesickness(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with home_building_id set: calculate Manhattan distance from NPC to home building. If distance > 20, reduce happiness by 3. If distance > 35, reduce happiness by 5. Return count of homesick NPCs.
