stories.title: NPC daily routine
stories.description: Create apply_daily_routine(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Get WorldState. period = tick % 24. If period < 8 (morning): NPCs set target to work_building. If 8 <= period < 16 (afternoon): NPCs stay. If >= 16 (evening): NPCs set target to home_building. Return dict with going_work, working, going_home counts.

stories.title: NPC pet ownership
stories.description: Create assign_pets(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with happiness > 60 and gold > 50 and no got_pet in memory_events: 10% chance to get pet. Add got_pet entry to memory_events. happiness += 5. gold -= 20. Return count of new pet owners.

stories.title: NPC birthday celebration
stories.description: Create check_birthdays(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Get WorldState day. For each living NPC with max_age > 0: if (day % max_age) == (age % max_age), birthday. happiness += 10. Add birthday entry to memory_events. Create Event(event_type='birthday'). Return count of birthdays.

stories.title: NPC addiction system
stories.description: Create check_addictions(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC: count memory_events entries with type=='tavern_visit'. If count > 5 and NPC not at tavern building, reduce happiness by 4. Return count of addicted NPCs.

stories.title: NPC rivalry escalation
stories.description: Create escalate_rivalries(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each Relationship with relationship_type=='rival' and strength > 80: 15% chance NPC commits crime type='assault'. Create Crime record. Reduce strength by 20. Return count of escalated rivalries.

stories.title: NPC forgiveness
stories.description: Create process_forgiveness(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each Relationship with relationship_type=='rival': reduce strength by 1. If strength reaches 0, change relationship_type to 'neutral'. Return count of forgiven rivalries.

stories.title: NPC talent discovery
stories.description: Create discover_talents(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with skill < 50: 5% chance to discover talent. If personality contains 'creative' skill += 10, 'diligent' skill += 8, else skill += 5. Add talent_discovered to memory_events. Return count.

stories.title: NPC social circles
stories.description: Create check_social_circles(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC: count Relationships with relationship_type=='friend'. If friend_count >= 3, happiness += 3. Return dict of {npc_id: friend_count}.

stories.title: NPC loneliness detection
stories.description: Create detect_loneliness(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC: count total Relationships. If 0, NPC is lonely: happiness -= 5. Add lonely entry to memory_events if not present. Return count of lonely NPCs.

stories.title: NPC work ethic
stories.description: Create apply_work_ethic(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC with work_building_id: base gold = 10. If personality contains 'diligent' gold = 12. If 'lazy' gold = 8. Add to NPC.gold. Create Transaction(reason='work_ethic'). Return total gold distributed.

stories.title: NPC fear system
stories.description: Create apply_fear_response(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. Query unresolved Crimes (resolved==0). For each crime get criminal NPC. Living NPCs within Manhattan distance 10 of criminal: add location to avoided_areas JSON. happiness -= 2. Return count of frightened NPCs.

stories.title: NPC goal system
stories.description: Create process_npc_goals(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For each living NPC: if no goal entry in memory_events, set goal with target_gold = gold + 100. If goal exists and gold >= target_gold, mark achieved, happiness += 10. Return count of goals achieved.

stories.title: Merchant reputation
stories.description: Create calculate_merchant_reputation(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each living merchant NPC: count Transactions as sender. reputation = min(100, transaction_count * 2). Return dict of {npc_id: reputation}.

stories.title: Black market system
stories.description: Create process_black_market(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Query Crimes with type=='theft' and resolved==0. For each: create Resource(name='stolen_goods', quantity=1) at random building. Create PriceHistory(resource_name='stolen_goods', price=50). Return count of items created.

stories.title: Insurance payout
stories.description: Create process_insurance_payouts(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Query Events with event_type in ('fire','earthquake','flood') from last 24 ticks. For each with affected_building_id: pay 50 gold from Treasury to each worker NPC. Create Transaction(reason='insurance'). Return total gold paid.

stories.title: Economic bubble detection
stories.description: Create detect_economic_bubble(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each resource_name in PriceHistory: get avg price and latest price. If latest > 3 * avg, resource is in bubble. Return list of bubble resource names. Return empty list if none.

stories.title: Market crash simulation
stories.description: Create simulate_market_crash(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Call detect_economic_bubble(db). If bubbles: create PriceHistory entries at 60% of latest. Reduce all NPC gold by 10%. Create Event(event_type='market_crash'). Return count of affected resources or 0.

stories.title: Cooperative formation
stories.description: Create form_cooperatives(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Find groups of 3+ living NPCs with same work_building_id. Pool 10% of each member gold. Add cooperative entry to member memory_events. Return count of cooperatives formed.

stories.title: Savings interest
stories.description: Create apply_savings_interest(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each living NPC with gold > 200: interest = max(1, gold // 100). gold += interest. Create Transaction(reason='savings_interest'). Return total interest paid.

stories.title: Bankruptcy recovery program
stories.description: Create process_bankruptcy_recovery(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each living NPC with is_bankrupt==1: increment experience by 1. If experience >= 50: set gold=10, is_bankrupt=0, experience=0. Create Event(event_type='bankruptcy_recovery'). Return count of recovered NPCs.

stories.title: Trade embargo
stories.description: Create apply_trade_embargo(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Find buildings where 3+ unresolved Crimes at workers. Reduce Resource quantities at building by 50%. Create Event(event_type='trade_embargo'). Return count of embargoed buildings.

stories.title: Luxury goods system
stories.description: Create process_luxury_purchases(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For each living NPC with gold > 200 and happiness < 70: gold -= 50, happiness += 10. Create Transaction(reason='luxury_purchase', amount=50). Return count of purchases.

stories.title: Economic advisor
stories.description: Create get_economic_advice(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Find living merchant with highest skill. If avg NPC gold < 50: 'lower_tax'. If > 200: 'raise_tax'. If inflation_rate > 1.5: 'tighten_money'. Else 'maintain'. Return dict with advisor_npc_id and recommendation.

stories.title: Resource spoilage
stories.description: Create process_resource_spoilage(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. For Resources with name containing 'food','grain','bread': reduce quantity by 5% (min 1). If quantity reaches 0, delete. Return count of spoiled resources.

stories.title: Auction system
stories.description: Create run_auction(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Find Resources with is_saturated==1. For each: find richest merchant as winner. Set resource building_id to winner building. Winner pays quantity * 10 gold. Create Transaction(reason='auction'). Return auction count.

stories.title: Wage disparity tracking
stories.description: Create calculate_wage_disparity(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. Query working NPCs gold. disparity = max_gold / max(1, min_gold). If > 10, create Event(event_type='wage_inequality'). Return disparity as float.

stories.title: Economic stimulus
stories.description: Create apply_economic_stimulus(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. If WorldState.economic_status=='recession' or avg NPC gold < 20: distribute 5 gold each from Treasury. Create Event(event_type='economic_stimulus'). Return total distributed or 0.

stories.title: Earthquake event
stories.description: Create trigger_earthquake(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Pick 1-3 random buildings. Reduce level by 1 (min 1). Create Event(event_type='earthquake', severity=3). All NPCs happiness -= 5. Return count of damaged buildings.

stories.title: Festival of lights
stories.description: Create trigger_festival_of_lights(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Create Event(event_type='festival_of_lights', severity=0). All living NPCs happiness += 10. Add festival_of_lights to memory_events. Return count of NPCs affected.

stories.title: Plague outbreak
stories.description: Create trigger_plague(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Pick 1 random living NPC as patient zero: illness='plague', illness_severity=5. NPCs within distance 3: 40% chance infection. Create Event(event_type='plague', severity=4). Return count of infected.

stories.title: Harvest festival
stories.description: Create trigger_harvest_festival(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Double Resource quantities where name contains 'food' or 'grain'. All living NPCs happiness += 5. Create Event(event_type='harvest_festival'). Return count of resources doubled.

stories.title: Fire event
stories.description: Create trigger_fire(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Pick 1 random building. If guard within distance 5: level -= 1 (min 1). If no guard: capacity = 0. Create Event(event_type='fire', severity=3). Return dict with building_id and destroyed bool.

stories.title: Flood event
stories.description: Create trigger_flood(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Tiles where y < 5: set terrain='flooded'. Buildings on flooded tiles: level -= 1. NPCs there: energy -= 20. Create Event(event_type='flood', severity=3). Return count of flooded tiles.

stories.title: Wedding festival
stories.description: Create trigger_wedding_festival(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Query Relationships where relationship_type=='spouse'. If any: all living NPCs happiness += 5. Create Event(event_type='wedding_festival'). Return count of couples. Return 0 if none.

stories.title: Talent show event
stories.description: Create trigger_talent_show(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Find living NPC with highest skill. Award 50 gold, happiness += 10. Create Event and Transaction(reason='talent_show_prize'). Return winner NPC id or None.

stories.title: Trade caravan arrival
stories.description: Create trigger_trade_caravan(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Find market building. If exists: add 3 Resources(name='caravan_goods', quantity=20). Create Event(event_type='trade_caravan'). Return resource count or 0 if no market.

stories.title: Bandit raid
stories.description: Create trigger_bandit_raid(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Count guards. For each living NPC: stolen = max(0, min(20, gold) - guard_count * 5). Deduct from gold (min 0). Create Event(event_type='bandit_raid', severity=2). Return total stolen.

stories.title: Miracle event
stories.description: Create trigger_miracle(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Find random living sick NPC. Set illness=None, illness_severity=0. happiness += 15. Create Event(event_type='miracle'). Return healed NPC id or None.

stories.title: Comet sighting
stories.description: Create trigger_comet_sighting(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. 2% random chance. If triggered: all living NPCs get comet_sighting in memory_events, happiness += 3. Create Event(event_type='comet_sighting'). Return True/False.

stories.title: Building collapse
stories.description: Create check_building_collapse(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. Buildings with level==1 and capacity > 0: 5% chance collapse. Set capacity=0. Workers get work_building_id=None. Create Event(event_type='building_collapse', severity=4). Return collapse count.

stories.title: Spring bloom
stories.description: Create trigger_spring_bloom(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. If WorldState weather=='sunny' or 'clear': all living NPCs happiness += 3. Create Event(event_type='spring_bloom'). Return NPC count or 0 if wrong weather.

stories.title: Drought relief
stories.description: Create trigger_drought_relief(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. If WorldState drought_active==1 and weather=='rain': set drought_active=0. Double food Resources. Create Event(event_type='drought_relief'). Return count doubled or 0.

stories.title: Political approval rating
stories.description: Create calculate_approval_rating(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. Find latest Election with winner_npc_id. If none, return None. approval = avg happiness of living NPCs. Return dict with mayor_npc_id, approval (float), population (int).

stories.title: Corruption detection
stories.description: Create detect_corruption(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. Find latest Election winner (mayor). If mayor.gold > 2 * avg gold: create Event(event_type='corruption_detected'). Return True/False. Return None if no mayor.

stories.title: Town curfew
stories.description: Create enforce_curfew(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. If WorldState.tick % 24 >= 20: for each living NPC with home_building_id, set target to home coords. Return count of NPCs sent home.

stories.title: Public speech
stories.description: Create give_public_speech(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. Find latest Election winner. If alive: all living NPCs happiness += 2. Create Dialogue and Event(event_type='public_speech'). Return mayor id or None.

stories.title: Opposition leader
stories.description: Create identify_opposition_leader(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. Find latest Election. Parse votes. Find second-place candidate. Return dict with opposition_npc_id, votes. Return None if < 2 candidates.

stories.title: Policy effectiveness review
stories.description: Create review_policy_effectiveness(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. For each enacted Policy: check avg NPC happiness. If > 50 mark effective. Return list of dicts with policy_id, name, effective bool.

stories.title: Town budget allocation
stories.description: Create allocate_town_budget(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. Sum Treasury gold. Split 40% infrastructure, 30% defense, 20% welfare, 10% events. Create Event(event_type='budget_allocation'). Return dict with category amounts and total.

stories.title: Diplomatic gift
stories.description: Create send_diplomatic_gift(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. Find NPCs with role=='visitor'. Give 20 gold each from Treasury. Create Transaction(reason='diplomatic_gift'). Return count or 0.

stories.title: War council
stories.description: Create hold_war_council(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. If 3+ living guards: create Event(event_type='war_council'). Count crimes. Return action dict. Return None if < 3 guards.

stories.title: Town expansion vote
stories.description: Create hold_expansion_vote(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. If buildings < living NPCs: 60% chance passes. Create Event if pass. Return dict with vote result string.

stories.title: Tax exemption
stories.description: Create apply_tax_exemption(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. For each living NPC with age <= 5: add tax_exempt to memory_events if not present. Return count of exempted NPCs.

stories.title: Public holiday declaration
stories.description: Create declare_public_holiday(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. Create Event(event_type='public_holiday'). All living NPCs: energy = min(100, energy+20), happiness += 5. target_x=None, target_y=None. Return rested count.

stories.title: Recall election
stories.description: Create check_recall_election(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. If avg happiness < 30: create Election with top 3 NPCs by skill. Create Event(event_type='recall_election'). Return True. Return False if >= 30.

stories.title: Policy sunset
stories.description: Create expire_old_policies(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. For each enacted Policy: if WorldState.tick - enacted_tick > 240, set status='expired'. Create Event(event_type='policy_expired'). Return count expired.

stories.title: Emergency tax
stories.description: Create apply_emergency_tax(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. Check for disaster Events in last 10 ticks. If found: each living NPC pays 5 gold to Treasury (min 0). Create Event(event_type='emergency_tax'). Return total collected or 0.

stories.title: Building repair system
stories.description: Create repair_damaged_buildings(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. For buildings with level < 3 and capacity > 0: if Treasury gold > 30, spend 30, level += 1. Create Event(event_type='building_repair'). Return count repaired.

stories.title: Building upgrade cost
stories.description: Create calculate_upgrade_cost(db, building_id) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Cost = level * 50. Check Treasury. Return dict with building_id, current_level, cost, can_afford. Return None if not found.

stories.title: Building efficiency rating
stories.description: Create calculate_building_efficiency(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. For each building with capacity > 0: efficiency = workers / capacity (max 1.0). Return dict of {building_id: efficiency}.

stories.title: Building decoration
stories.description: Create decorate_building(db, building_id, gold_amount) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Deduct gold from Treasury. If enough: nearby NPCs (distance 5) happiness += 2. Create Event(event_type='building_decorated'). Return True/False.

stories.title: Building demolition
stories.description: Create demolish_building(db, building_id) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. If capacity == 0: reassign workers/residents, delete Resources and building. Return True. If capacity > 0 return False.

stories.title: Infrastructure decay
stories.description: Create apply_infrastructure_decay(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Buildings with level > 1: 3% chance to lose 1 level. Create Event(event_type='infrastructure_decay'). Return count decayed.

stories.title: Building blueprint system
stories.description: Create create_building_blueprint(db, name, building_type, x, y) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. If no building at (x,y): create Building(capacity=0, level=0). Return new id. If occupied return None.

stories.title: Public building access
stories.description: Create get_public_buildings(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Return buildings with building_type in ('civic','market','church','tavern','hospital') as list of dicts with id, name, type, x, y.

stories.title: Building production scaling
stories.description: Create get_production_multiplier(db, building_id) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. multiplier = 1.0 + (level-1)*0.25. If workers >= capacity and capacity > 0, add 0.1. Return float.

stories.title: Building fire safety rating
stories.description: Create calculate_fire_safety(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. For each building: count guards (is_dead==0) within Manhattan distance 5. safety = min(100, count * 25). Return dict {building_id: safety}.

stories.title: Building noise level
stories.description: Create calculate_noise_levels(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Tavern noise=3, market=2, others=0. For residential buildings: sum noise from buildings within distance 3. If > 3, residents happiness -= 2. Return dict {building_id: noise}.

stories.title: Building historical value
stories.description: Create calculate_historical_value(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. prestige = level * 10 + min(WorldState.tick // 100, 50) per building. Return dict with town_prestige total and per-building prestige.

stories.title: Market stall system
stories.description: Create setup_market_stalls(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Find market building. For each living merchant: create Resource(name='stall_'+name, quantity=1) at market. Return stall count or 0.

stories.title: Building capacity upgrade
stories.description: Create upgrade_building_capacity(db, building_id) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. Cost = capacity * 10 from Treasury. If affordable: capacity += 5. Create Event(event_type='capacity_upgrade'). Return new capacity or None.

stories.title: Building network effects
stories.description: Create calculate_network_effects(db) in engine/simulation/buildings.py. For each building: count others within Manhattan distance 5. has_bonus = (count >= 3). Return dict {building_id: {adjacent: N, has_bonus: bool}}.

stories.title: NPC daily schedule API
stories.description: Create GET /api/npcs/{npc_id}/schedule in engine/routers/npcs.py. Return NPC schedule based on tick periods. Return 404 if not found.

stories.title: Crime statistics API
stories.description: Create GET /api/stats/crime in engine/routers/stats.py. Return total_crimes, resolved, unresolved, resolution_rate, crimes_by_type.

stories.title: Weather forecast API
stories.description: Create GET /api/weather/forecast in engine/routers/world.py. Return current weather and 24-tick forecast.

stories.title: Election history API
stories.description: Create GET /api/elections/history in engine/routers/stats.py. Return all Elections sorted by tick_held descending.

stories.title: Policy effectiveness API
stories.description: Create GET /api/policies/effectiveness in engine/routers/stats.py. Return policies with name, effect, status, enacted_tick.

stories.title: Trade volume API
stories.description: Create GET /api/economy/trade-volume in engine/routers/economy.py. Accept optional days param (default 7). Return daily transaction volumes.

stories.title: Population demographics API
stories.description: Create GET /api/stats/demographics in engine/routers/stats.py. Return total, by_role, avg_age, avg_happiness, avg_gold, sick_count, employed.

stories.title: Building occupancy API
stories.description: Create GET /api/buildings/occupancy in engine/routers/stats.py. Return per-building workers, capacity, utilization.

stories.title: NPC mood history API
stories.description: Create GET /api/npcs/{npc_id}/mood in engine/routers/npcs.py. Return npc_id, name, happiness, recent memory_events. Return 404 if not found.

stories.title: Town comparison API
stories.description: Create GET /api/town/comparison in engine/routers/stats.py. Return current stats vs day-one defaults with change diffs.

stories.title: Seasonal weather cycle
stories.description: Create apply_seasonal_weather(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. season = (WorldState.day % 96) // 24. 0=spring('sunny'), 1=summer('hot'), 2=autumn('cloudy'), 3=winter('snow'). Update weather. Create Event on season change (day%24==0). Return season name.

stories.title: NPC lifespan variation
stories.description: Create vary_npc_lifespan(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For living NPCs with max_age==0 or None: assign by role (farmer=80, guard=70, merchant=85, priest=90, baker=75, default=78). 'healthy' +5, 'reckless' -5. Return count updated.

stories.title: Town reputation score
stories.description: Create calculate_town_reputation(db) in engine/simulation/economy.py. economy=min(100, avg gold), safety=max(0, 100-crimes*10), happiness=avg happiness. reputation=(economy+safety+happiness)/3. Return dict with all scores.

stories.title: Immigration wave
stories.description: Create check_immigration_wave(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. If avg happiness > 70 and living NPCs < 20: create 2 NPCs (role='immigrant', gold=20). Create Event(event_type='immigration'). Return count (0 if not triggered).

stories.title: Emigration wave
stories.description: Create check_emigration_wave(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. If avg happiness < 30 and living NPCs > 3: set lowest-happiness NPC is_dead=1. Create Event(event_type='emigration'). Return 1 or 0.

stories.title: Historical archive
stories.description: Create save_town_snapshot(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. If tick % 100 == 0: capture population, gold, happiness, buildings, weather. Store as Event(event_type='town_snapshot'). Return snapshot dict or None.

stories.title: Town naming ceremony
stories.description: Create check_naming_ceremony(db) in engine/simulation/events.py. At building thresholds (10,20,30,40,50): create Milestone if not exists. Create Event(event_type='naming_ceremony'). Return milestone name or None.

stories.title: Resource discovery
stories.description: Create discover_new_resource(db) in engine/simulation/production.py. 3% chance. Pick random building, create Resource(name from [gems,clay,herbs,iron_ore,marble], quantity 5-20). Create Event(event_type='resource_discovery'). Return name or None.

stories.title: Legacy system
stories.description: Create record_npc_legacy(db) in engine/simulation/npcs.py. For dead NPCs without legacy_recorded in memory_events: count Transactions, Relationships, Crimes. Create Event(event_type='npc_legacy'). Add legacy_recorded. Return count.

stories.title: Simulation speed report
stories.description: Create generate_speed_report(db) in engine/simulation/tick.py. Count total_npcs, living_npcs, buildings, resources, events, transactions. complexity = total_npcs * buildings. Return dict with tick and all counts.
